title: PayPal spins out Venmo as a standalone unit
body: PayPal is consciously uncoupling Venmo into its own standalone unit for the first time, part of a broader reorganization that creates three distinct segments.

title: Block named to TIME's most influential finance companies for 2026
body: 🔲 Block was named one of TIME's most influential finance companies for 2026.

title: Sezzle exploring deposit accounts
body: ♨ Sezzle is exploring additional financial services, including deposit accounts.

title: Synchrony expands Lowe's partnership to pro customers
body: 🧰 Synchrony expanded their partnership with Lowe's, now issuing the branded credit card for their pro customers.

title: PayPal and Block report earnings next week
body: 🔢 PayPal (May 5) and Block (May 7) also report earnings next week.
